functions.title: Guide Book #32
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #32§r
§lSpore Pot§r
§8BLOCK§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lFound naturally§r: NO
•§lCraftable on§r: Artifacture Table
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lBlast Resistance§r: 15.0
•§lHardness§r: 2.0
•§lFlammable§r: NO

•§lMining Tool§r: Pickaxe
•§lDrops on breaking§r: Spore Pot
•Can be activated using any type of §lPowder§r or §lDust§r item, including Sugar and Redstone, but except snow powder.
•Spore pots will emit particles once they are activated.

•Activated Spore pots have different appearances depending on the type of material you use to activate them.
•They have a random chance to spawn a powder or dust they emit. And they can also have a chance to be deactivated.

•The enchanted spore pot has a random chance to spawn §lXP Orbs§r.
•The active spore pots can be manually deactivated using a §lSalt§r.
